input.excerpt: 450 words on remote work and downtown vacancy — BLS statistics, Portland city council vote, Columbia University study, NAR cost comparison

test_cases.notes: All numerical claims flagged. Structural concern (both BLS figures must be from same series) is the highest-value insight in the checklist. Source type recommendations are specific. Internal ambiguity ('nearly 28 percent') correctly flagged. Excellent.

input.excerpt: 380 words involving corporate financial figures, a regulatory agency ruling, and quotes from three named sources
input.high_risk_areas: Legal claims about the regulatory ruling

test_cases.notes: Legal claims correctly classified as High Priority and flagged for legal review, not just fact-check. Financial figures all captured. Source title verifications included. Checklist is appropriately thorough for investigative standard.

input.draft_type: Personal essay / column with reported elements
input.excerpt: 300 words with minimal statistics — one historical date, one attributed quote, one institutional claim

test_cases.notes: Light standard applied correctly — only three items flagged. Skill correctly distinguishes opinion/argument from reported elements and does not flag interpretive claims. Checklist is proportionate to the piece. Passes threshold.
